chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَوْضِعِ رَأْسِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 228 – Place of the head of Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/290)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/290)
text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ هُوَ بِالْحِيرَةِ أَ مَا تُرِيدُ مَا وَعَدْتُكَ قُلْتُ بَلَى يَعْنِي الذَّهَابَ إِلَى قَبْرِ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ

قَالَ فَرَكِبَ وَ رَكِبَ إِسْمَاعِيلُ وَ رَكِبْتُ مَعَهُمَا حَتَّى إِذَا جَازَ الثُّوَيَّةَ وَ كَانَ بَيْنَ الْحِيرَةِ وَ النَّجَفِ عِنْدَ ذَكَوَاتٍ بِيضٍ نَزَلَ وَ نَزَلَ إِسْمَاعِيلُ وَ نَزَلْتُ مَعَهُمَا فَصَلَّى وَ صَلَّى إِسْمَاعِيلُ وَ صَلَّيْتُ

فَقَالَ لِإِسْمَاعِيلَ قُمْ فَسَلِّمْ عَلَى جَدِّكَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ أَ لَيْسَ الْحُسَيْنُ بِكَرْبَلَاءَ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ وَ لَكِنْ لَمَّا حُمِلَ رَأْسُهُ إِلَى الشَّامِ سَرَقَهُ مَوْلًى لَنَا فَدَفَنَهُ بِجَنْبِ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Yahya Bin Zakariyya, from Yazeed Bin Umar Bin Talha who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to me, and he<sup>asws</sup> was at Al-Hira: ‘Do you want what I<sup>asws</sup> have promised you?’ I said, ‘Yes’ – meaning the going to the grave of Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>.

He (the narrator) said, ‘So heasws rode, and Ismail rode, and I rode with the two of them until when Al-Sawaiyya was exceeded, and it was between Al-Hira and Al-Najaf, by the white stones, heasws descended, and Ismail descended, and I descended along with them. So heasws Prayed Salaat, and Ismail Prayed Salaat and I Prayed Salaat along with them.

So he<sup>asws</sup> said to Ismail: ‘Arise and greet your grandfather Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>’. So I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Is not Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> at Karbala?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, but when his<sup>asws</sup> head was carried to Syria, a friend of ours<sup>asws</sup> took it away for us<sup>asws</sup>. So we<sup>asws</sup> buried it by the side of Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Yahya ibn Zakariya from Yazid ibn ‘Umar ibn Talhah who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once said to me, when he was in al-Hirah, ’Do you want to have what I had promised you?’ I said, ‘Yes, I do want to have it,’ meaning visiting the gravesite of ’Amir al-Mu’minin. He (the narrator) has said, ‘He, Isma‘il and I embarked with them and we moved until we passed al-Thuwayyah (a place near al-Kufah). Between al-Hirah and al-Najaf there were white pieces of stones. He (the Imam) disembarked so also did Isma‘il and I. He (the Imam) performed salat (prayer) so also did Isma‘il and I also performed salat (prayer). He (the Imam) said to Isma‘il, ‘Stand up and offer al-Salam to your great grandfather, al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam .’ I then asked, ‘I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause, is not al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, in Karbala 5 ?’ He (the Imam) replied, ‘That is true but when they were taking his head to al-Sham one of our friends stealthily took the head away from them and buried it beside ’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam.’”
